fragments.description: Bind native route, target applicability, deterministic selection, and the selection receipt without adding domain checks.

slots.purpose: Existing target step that owns native route selection.
Existing target step that owns applicability evidence.
Existing target checks that validate selection behavior.
Existing target artifact that carries the selection receipt.

fragments.claim_boundary: Selection supervision only; target domain meaning, builders, validators, closure, installation, and release remain outside this fragment.

fragments.description: Bind preview, builder, native validator, and instance receipt ownership without adding or reinterpreting target checks.

slots.purpose: Existing target step that materializes the read-only preview.
Existing target artifact that carries the instance receipt.

fragments.claim_boundary: Instance supervision only; it cannot create target-domain validity, installed parity, release, publication, or future behavior evidence.

fragments.description: Bind staged projection, activation, installed checks, and rollback ownership without becoming an installation authority.

slots.purpose: Existing target step that stages the installation projection.
Existing target step that activates or restores the projection.
Existing installed currentness and native checks.

fragments.claim_boundary: Installation supervision only; it does not prove native target behavior, release, publication, or Git synchronization.

claim_boundary: This reviewed catalog supplies target-neutral compiler inputs only. Runtime authority remains the current contract source, compiled contract, and exact check manifest.
